result.stdout:
ObjectiveIron — HoI4 C# Transpiler

Usage: objective-iron <command> [options]

Commands:
  sample      Generate a sample mod to verify the pipeline
  build       Build a mod from C# definitions (WIP)
  version     Show version information

Options:
  -o, --output <path>    Output directory (default: ./sample_output)
  -h, --help             Show this help message
